acceptance_targets: [ch10-craft-001] PASS if the revised negotiation terms and Eli's boxed math in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111-120 and :339-341 produce a clearly stated post-room weekly net of approximately $480, with no conflicting numbers in the chapter; FAIL if the text still implies $320 net or leaves incompatible totals.

[ch10-craft-002] PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:349-356 includes (1) visible message text addressed to June, (2) one embodied reaction during the attempt, and (3) a specific stated reason for not sending; FAIL if it remains a single summary sentence about closing the phone.

[ch10-booker-001] PASS if the revised span contains a distinct decision by Eli that changes what happens later in the same night (not just more tasks), and the sequence no longer reads as uninterrupted procedural logging; FAIL if events remain mostly task-then-task without a new causal turn.
[FBK-02-010] PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3308 no longer uses "landed" impact phrasing and still preserves the emotional beat; FAIL if only synonyms of the same template are swapped in.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised negotiation terms and Eli's boxed math in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111-120 and :339-341 produce a clearly stated post-room weekly net of approximately $480, with no conflicting numbers in the chapter; FAIL if the text still implies $320 net or leaves incompatible totals.
findings.problem: Continuity contradiction with canonical financial state: this chapter establishes $12/hour for 40 hours and a $160 room deduction (net $320 before other costs), but canon pegs Glenwood motel income at about $480 weekly after room deduction.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111-120 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:339-341, reconcile the arithmetic to canon in-scene (e.g., adjust hourly rate/shift count or add a guaranteed cash differential) while keeping Eli's net calculation internally consistent in the same passage.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:349-356 includes (1) visible message text addressed to June, (2) one embodied reaction during the attempt, and (3) a specific stated reason for not sending; FAIL if it remains a single summary sentence about closing the phone.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the highest emotional-pressure beat: Eli's contact with June is reduced to summary avoidance (close phone) instead of rendered scene presence. This is summary replacing scene exactly where the narrative needs specific emotional consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:349-356 into a short on-page attempt/failure beat: show at least one drafted line to June, a concrete bodily response while composing/deleting, and a specific fear tied to their established rupture before he chooses silence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span contains a distinct decision by Eli that changes what happens later in the same night (not just more tasks), and the sequence no longer reads as uninterrupted procedural logging; FAIL if events remain mostly task-then-task without a new causal turn.
findings.problem: Mid-chapter momentum flattens into a work-log sequence. The first-shift section accumulates tasks but adds limited new causal pressure between early pain spikes and the later trash-spill intervention, weakening scene-level escalation.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:209-312, compress at least one repetitive housekeeping beat and introduce one consequential complication (guest, cash, policy, or physical failure) that forces Eli to make a choice with immediate cost before Marisol's line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:263.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3308 no longer uses "landed" impact phrasing and still preserves the emotional beat; FAIL if only synonyms of the same template are swapped in.
findings.problem: Same 8-chapter recurring "landed harder" formula appears in this chapter, reducing sentence-level surprise in an otherwise grounded labor scene. Chapter action: REPLACE.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3308 with a new chapter-specific response anchored to the breakfast-crew interaction, avoiding "landed" impact language.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
